summary: The diff implements most of the RBAC requirements but has notable gaps. REQ-1 backend RBAC is partially implemented via AccessControl/MixinAuthorization modules, but the first-principal-as-admin stable state initialization is not clearly visible in the truncated backend. REQ-2 frontend actor usage is updated in useQueries.ts using useActor hook. REQ-3 backend grantAdmin/revokeAdmin functions are not evidenced in the diff, and the SettingsPage shows no grant/revoke UI controls. REQ-4 getCallerRole() is implemented and used in Header and Sidebar. A migration.mo file required by constraints is not present. The diff also contains a password-based login flow that contradicts REQ-1's requirement to remove password-based admin checks.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove or replace any hardcoded principal or password-based admin checks. First principal to register stored as admin in stable state.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff still contains a password-based login flow in LoginScreen.tsx and AuthContext.tsx (actor.login(username, password)), and ManagedUser still has a passwordHash field in backend/main.mo. The password-based admin check pattern persists. The first-principal-as-admin stable state initialization is not clearly visible in the truncated backend diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes grantAdmin(principal) and revokeAdmin(principal) functions callable only by existing admins. SettingsPage displays role management controls for promoting/demoting users.
missing_requirements.reason: No grantAdmin or revokeAdmin functions are visible in the backend/main.mo diff. The SettingsPage.tsx diff shows no grant/revoke admin UI controls despite Shield and ShieldOff icons being imported.

missing_requirements.requirement: Frontend calls getMyRole() after login to verify the authenticated user's actual role from the backend.
missing_requirements.reason: AuthContext.tsx does not show a post-login call to verify role from the backend. The login flow still parses role from a token string rather than calling a backend role query after authentication.

hallucinated_features.description: migration.mo file for preserving stable state during backend schema upgrades
hallucinated_features.reason: The build constraints explicitly require generating a migration.mo file, but no such file appears anywhere in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: ClientRegistrySection extracted as a new standalone component
hallucinated_features.reason: A new ClientRegistrySection.tsx component was added and not requested in any of the four requirements.
